description: Read-only MCP diagnostics server for RavenDB.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint not provided and registryType='nuget' not in the inference table)

name: io.github.ravendb/ravendb-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated RavenDB node URLs of a single cluster, e.g. https://a.example:443,https://b.example:443
environmentVariables.name: RAVENDB_URLS

environmentVariables.description: Path to a client .pfx certificate for secured RavenDB. Leave empty for unsecured.
environmentVariables.name: RAVENDB_CERTIFICATE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Directory where exported artifacts (logs, packages, dumps) are written.
environmentVariables.name: RAVENDB_ARTIFACTS_PATH
